message:
Fix trailing whitespace in test reference file

The diagnostic output includes a trailing space after the caret marker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,6 +16,6 @@ warning: octet count prefix ignored
  --> tests/functions/parse_syslog/octet_counting_length_mismatch.tql:4:5
   |
 4 | x = x.parse_syslog()
-  |     ~
+  |     ~ 
   |
   = note: message parsed without framing
